case_title: QU FEN CHEN VS. RICKY RIKU OHTAKE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER VIVIAN CHOY. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, QU FEN AS TO DEFENDANT OHTAKE, RICKY RIKU

COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, QU FEN
